#### More charts are coming soon.

Contact [Atish](https://www.linkedin.com/in/atish-goswami-04b42780/) for contributors access.

### Insights

#### M2 Associate Developer

27% developers took M2 Associate Developer as their first certification.

#### M2 Solution Specialist

18.4% developers cleared M2 Solution Specialist.

#### M2 Full Stack Developer

2% developers are 3x certified i.e M2 Professional + M2 JavaScript + M2 Frontend End
